instruction: asyncio ile iki asenkron gorevi eszamanli calistir.
response:
import asyncio
async def g(a,b):
  await asyncio.sleep(b)
  return f'{a} tamamlandi'
async def main():
  r=await asyncio.gather(g('A',1),g('B',2))
  print(r)
asyncio.run(main())

from contextlib import contextmanager
import time
@contextmanager
def z():
  b=time.time()
  yield
  print(f'Gecen: {time.time()-b:.3f}s')
with z():
  time.sleep(0.5)

from functools import total_ordering
@total_ordering
class O:
  def __init__(self,n): self.n=n
  def __eq__(self,o): return self.n==o.n
  def __lt__(self,o): return self.n<o.n
print(O(5)>O(3))

import asyncio
async def u(q):
  for i in range(3): await q.put(i)
async def tuk(q):
  for _ in range(3): print(await q.get())
async def main():
  q=asyncio.Queue()
  await asyncio.gather(u(q),tuk(q))
asyncio.run(main())

instruction: LEFT JOIN ile tum musterileri getir.
response: SELECT m.ad,s.tarih FROM musteri m LEFT JOIN siparis s ON m.id=s.musteri_id;
SELECT m.ad,s.tutar FROM musteri m RIGHT JOIN siparis s ON m.id=s.musteri_id;
SELECT m.ad,s.tutar FROM musteri m FULL OUTER JOIN siparis s ON m.id=s.musteri_id;
SELECT c.ad AS calisan,y.ad AS yonetici FROM calisan c JOIN calisan y ON c.yonetici_id=y.id;
SELECT * FROM renkler CROSS JOIN bedenler;
SELECT m.ad,u.ad,s.tarih FROM siparis s JOIN musteri m ON s.m_id=m.id JOIN urun u ON s.u_id=u.id;
WITH yuksek AS (SELECT * FROM urun WHERE fiyat>100) SELECT * FROM yuksek;
WITH RECURSIVE alt AS (SELECT id,ad,ust_id FROM kategori WHERE ust_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT k.id,k.ad,k.ust_id FROM kategori k JOIN alt a ON k.ust_id=a.id) SELECT * FROM alt;
SELECT ad,fiyat,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY fiyat DESC) AS sira FROM urun;
SELECT ad,puan,RANK() OVER(ORDER BY puan DESC) AS r,DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY puan DESC) AS dr FROM ogrenci;
SELECT tarih,tutar,LAG(tutar,1) OVER(ORDER BY tarih) AS onceki FROM satis;
SELECT tarih,tutar,LEAD(tutar,1) OVER(ORDER BY tarih) AS sonraki FROM satis;
SELECT tarih,tutar,SUM(tutar) OVER(ORDER BY tarih) AS kumulatif FROM satis;
SELECT tarih,tutar,AVG(tutar) OVER(ORDER BY tarih ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ortalama FROM satis;
SELECT ad,bolum,maas,FIRST_VALUE(ad) OVER(PARTITION BY bolum ORDER BY maas DESC) AS en_yuksek FROM calisan;
SELECT ad,maas,NTILE(4) OVER(ORDER BY maas DESC) AS dilim FROM calisan;
SELECT ad,maas,CUME_DIST() OVER(ORDER BY maas) FROM calisan;
SELECT ad,maas,PERCENT_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY maas) FROM calisan;

CREATE INDEX idx_musteri_sehir ON musteri(sehir);
SELECT * FROM musteri WHERE sehir='Istanbul';
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_mail ON musteri(email);

CREATE VIEW aktif_siparis AS SELECT * FROM siparis WHERE durum='aktif';
SELECT * FROM aktif_siparis;

CREATE SEQUENCE urun_seq START 1 INCREMENT 1;
INSERT INTO urun(id,ad) VALUES(NEXT VALUE FOR urun_seq,'Kalem');

ALTER TABLE musteri ADD COLUMN telefon VARCHAR(15);
ALTER TABLE musteri ADD COLUMN dogum_tarihi DATE;
ALTER TABLE musteri DROP COLUMN telefon;
CREATE TABLE calisan (id INT, ad VARCHAR(50), maas DECIMAL(10,2) CHECK (maas>0), yas INT CHECK (yas>=18 AND yas<=65));
CREATE TABLE siparis (id INT, tarih DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, tutar DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00);
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM musteri WHERE sehir='Istanbul';
SELECT sehir FROM musteri INTERSECT SELECT sehir FROM tedarikci;
SELECT sehir FROM musteri EXCEPT SELECT sehir FROM tedarikci;
SELECT * FROM musteri WHERE ad ILIKE '%ali%';
SELECT * FROM musteri WHERE ad ~ '^[A-Z]';
SELECT sehir,urun_kategori,SUM(tutar) FROM satis GROUP BY CUBE(sehir,urun_kategori);
SELECT sehir,ilce,SUM(tutar) FROM satis GROUP BY ROLLUP(sehir,ilce);
SELECT sehir,ilce,SUM(tutar) FROM satis GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((sehir),(ilce),());
SELECT TOP 3 WITH TIES ad,maas FROM calisan ORDER BY maas DESC;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT sehir,urun,satis_miktari FROM satis) AS src PIVOT(SUM(satis_miktari) FOR sehir IN([Istanbul],[Ankara])) AS pvt;
SELECT sehir,urun,miktar FROM (SELECT * FROM satis_pivot) AS p UNPIVOT(miktar FOR sehir IN([Istanbul],[Ankara])) AS unpvt;
MERGE INTO hedef h USING kaynak k ON h.id=k.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET h.ad=k.ad WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(id,ad) VALUES(k.id,k.ad);
SELECT sehir,STRING_AGG(ad,', ') AS musteriler FROM musteri GROUP BY sehir;
SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT('elma,armut,muz',',');
SELECT ad,DATEDIFF(YEAR,dogum_tarihi,GETDATE()) AS yas FROM musteri;
SELECT EOMONTH('2025-06-23') AS ay_sonu;
SELECT FORMAT(1234567.89,'N2','tr-TR') AS formatli;
SELECT ad,CHOOSE(seviye,'Dusuk','Orta','Yuksek') AS seviye_adi FROM personel;
SELECT ad,maas,IIF(maas>5000,'Yuksek','Dusuk') AS kategori FROM calisan;
SELECT TRY_CAST('123' AS INT) AS basarili, TRY_CAST('abc' AS INT) AS basarisiz;
SELECT HASHBYTES('SHA2_256','sifre123') AS hash;
SELECT SYSTEM_USER AS sistem_kullanici, CURRENT_USER AS mevcut_kullanici;
SELECT m.ad,s.tutar FROM musteri m JOIN siparis s ON m.id=s.musteri_id WHERE s.tutar>100;
CREATE VIEW genclik AS SELECT * FROM musteri WHERE yas<30 WITH CHECK OPTION;
ALTER TABLE siparis ADD CONSTRAINT fk_musteri FOREIGN KEY (musteri_id) REFERENCES musteri(id);
ALTER TABLE siparis DROP CONSTRAINT fk_musteri;
BULK INSERT musteri FROM 'C:\veri.csv' WITH (FIELDTERMINATOR=',',ROWTERMINATOR='\n',FIRSTROW=2);
SELECT TRY_PARSE('23/06/2025' AS DATE USING 'tr-TR') AS tarih;

UPDATE musteri SET sehir='Ankara' WHERE id=1;
SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS etkilenen;
SELECT sehir,SUM(tutar) FROM satis GROUP BY sehir COMPUTE SUM(tutar);

instruction: CSS Grid named areas ile yerlesim.
CSS subgrid ile ic ice grid.
response:
.parent{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
.child{display:grid;grid-template-columns:subgrid;grid-column:span 3}

.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:16px}
.grid2{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr))}

instruction: CSS Flexbox order ile sira degistirme.

response:
.container{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 24px}
.item{flex:1 1 200px}

.metin{columns:3;column-gap:32px;column-rule:1px solid #ccc}
h2{break-before:column}
img{float:left;shape-outside:circle(50%);shape-margin:12px;width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:50%}

.sekil{clip-path:polygon(50% 0%,100% 50%,50% 100%,0% 50%);background:#3498db;width:200px;height:200px}
.sekil2{clip-path:circle(50% at center)}
.gorsel{width:300px;height:200px;object-fit:cover;-webkit-mask:linear-gradient(to bottom,black 60%,transparent 100%);mask:linear-gradient(to bottom,black 60%,transparent 100%)}
.kutu{border:10px solid transparent;border-image:url('border.png')30 round;padding:20px}
h1{text-shadow:2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3),0 0 20px rgba(52,152,219,0.5);font-size:3rem}
.kutu{box-shadow:0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1),0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15),inset 0 2px 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.5)}

.tekrar{background:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,#eee,#eee 10px,#ddd 10px,#ddd 20px)}
.strip{background:repeating-linear-gradient(90deg,red,red 20px,white 20px,white 40px)}

.kutu{transform-origin:top left;transition:transform 0.3s}
.kutu:hover{transform:rotate(45deg)}

.hareketli{transform:translate3d(100px,50px,0);transition:transform 0.3s}
.hareketli:hover{transform:translate3d(150px,50px,0)}

.metin{overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
.cok-satir{display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:3;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden}

.dikey{writing-mode:vertical-rl;text-orientation:mixed}
.dikey2{writing-mode:vertical-lr}
.saga{unicode-bidi:bidi-override;direction:rtl}

html{overscroll-behavior:contain}
.kapsayici{overscroll-behavior:auto;height:200px;overflow:auto}
.gec{content-visibility:auto;contain-intrinsic-size:500px}
.kutu{contain:layout paint style;content-visibility:auto}

.sifirla{all:unset}
.miras{all:revert}

@font-face{font-family:'Ozel';src:url('ozel.woff2')format('woff2');font-weight:400;font-display:swap}
body{font-family:'Ozel',sans-serif}

@keyframes slide{from{transform:translateX(-100%);opacity:0}to{transform:translateX(0);opacity:1}}
.animasyon{animation:slide 0.5s ease-out}
.kutu{animation:slide 0.5s ease-out forwards}
.kutu{animation:pulse 1s ease-in-out infinite alternate}

.sprite{animation:walk 1s steps(4) infinite}
@keyframes walk{from{background-position:0 0}to{background-position:-400px 0}}
.kutu{transition:transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.68,-0.55,0.27,1.55)}

.kapsayici{container-type:inline-size;container-name:kart}
@container kart(min-width:400px){.baslik{font-size:2rem}}

.kutu{background:color-mix(in srgb,#ff0000 50%,#0000ff);
color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--renk1) 30%,var(--renk2))}

:root{accent-color:#e74c3c;color-scheme:light dark}
input[type=checkbox]{accent-color:#27ae60}

def binary_search(arr,t):
  l,r=0,len(arr)-1
  while l<=r:
    m=(l+r)//2
    if arr[m]==t:return m
    elif arr[m]<t:l=m+1
    else:r=m-1
  return-1
print(binary_search([1,2,3,4,5],3))

def fib_dp(n):
  if n<2:return n
  dp=[0]*(n+1);dp[1]=1
  for i in range(2,n+1):dp[i]=dp[i-1]+dp[i-2]
  return dp[n]
print(fib_dp(100))

def insertion_sort(arr):
  for i in range(1,len(arr)):
    key=arr[i];j=i-1
    while j>=0 and arr[j]>key:arr[j+1]=arr[j];j-=1
    arr[j+1]=key
  return arr
print(insertion_sort([12,11,13,5,6]))
